entity.label: Ammizabad
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: People of the giver, the son of Benaiah, who was the third and chief captain of the host under David (1 Chr. 27:6).

nodes.label: Ammizabad
nodes.description: People of the giver, the son of Benaiah, who was the third and chief captain of the host under David (1 Chr. 27:6).

nodes.label: Benaiah
nodes.description: The son of Jehoiada, chief priest (1 Chr. 27:5). He was set by David over his body-guard of Cherethites and Pelethites (2 Sam. 8:18; 1 Kings 1:32; 1 Chr. 18:17). His exploits are enumerated in 2 Sam. 23:20, 21, 22; 1 Chr. 11:22. He remained faithful to Solomon (1 Kings 1:8, 10, 26), by whom he was raised to the rank of commander-in-chief (1 Kings 2:25, 29, 30, 34, 35; 4:4).

verses.text: This is that Benaiah, who was mighty among the thirty, and above the thirty: and in his course was Ammizabad his son.
